English: Your child is starting school in Canada. You are thousands of miles away.

English: When challenges arise, a dedicated local advisor is already responding.
中文: 当凌晨三点电话响起，你知道当地已经有人接起。

English: International students encounter complex situations: housing issues, academic complications, culture and emotional challenges. Parents need reliable information about their child's wellbeing and a high-touch response system.
中文: 国际学生常面临住宿、学业、文化差异和情感挑战等复杂情况。家长需获取可靠信息了解孩子的身心健康，并获得高效响应支持系统。

中文: 你想要独立，也得到了。但晚上十点买感冒药时，你需要有人知道去哪儿。

中文: 出国本该令人兴奋，但从签证手续到连吃三天泡面，兴奋很快变成生存模式。

English: Crestway Global provides structured support that enables students to focus on their academic and personal growth.
中文: Crestway Global 面向那些想真正享受这段旅程、而不是仅仅熬过去的学生。

中文: 我们亲自到场，看房、核对房东信息，并知道哪家诊所接受国际保险。

English: You call your daughter. She sounds tired. You can't tell if it's finals stress or something worse.

中文: 你每月收到具体更新：住宿、校园参与、下一步安排。

中文: Crestway Global 面向那些想真正享受这段旅程、而不是仅仅熬过去的学生。

English: Safety & Wellbeing
中文: 安全与身心健康

English: Safety isn't a feature. It's the starting point.
中文: 安全不是一种功能，而是我们的起点。

English: Every guardianship service says "your child is safe." We'd rather show you what that actually looks like.
中文: 每家监护服务机构都承诺"您的孩子很安全"，但我们更愿意向您展示这究竟意味着什么。

English: For Families
中文: 为家庭提供安心

English: For Students
中文: 为学生提供支持

English: Peace of Mind for Families
中文: 为家庭带来的安心保障

English: Knowing your child has a trusted safety network nearby changes everything. You stop wondering and start sleeping.
中文: 知道您的孩子身边有值得信赖的安全网络，一切都会有所不同。您不再担忧，终于能安心入睡。

English: Through our partnership with Community Patrol, Crestway Global gives students immediate access to help when they need it. That means you and your child can focus on what matters: grades, growth, and actually enjoying the experience.
中文: 通过与 Community Patrol 的合作，Crestway Global 为学生提供即时帮助，当他们需要时即可获得支持。这意味着您和孩子可以专注于真正重要的事：成绩、成长和享受这段经历。

English: We visit housing before anything gets signed. Smoke detectors, landlord background checks, neighborhood verification.
中文: 在签署任何协议前，我们都会实地探访住宿。包括烟雾报警器检查、房东背景调查及社区核实。

English: 24/7 emergency line answered by someone who knows your student's name. Not a call center.
中文: 24/7紧急热线由熟悉您学生姓名的人接听，而非普通呼叫中心。

English: Airport pickup, first-week city orientation, and a clear plan for when something goes wrong.
中文: 机场接机、第一周城市导览，以及遇到问题时的清晰应对方案。

English: Crestway Assist: a 24/7 safety button inside the app. One tap connects your child to someone who already knows their situation.
中文: Crestway Assist：应用内的24/7安全按钮，一键连接已了解您孩子情况的专人。

English: Personal Safety & Assistance
中文: 个人安全与支持

English: New country. Unfamiliar situations. That's normal. What shouldn't be normal is having no one to call.
中文: 新国家、不熟悉的环境，这是正常的。不正常的是，无人可联系。

English: Through our partnership with Community Patrol, you can access priority assistance through the Crestway app. If you need guidance or someone to step in, help is one notification away.
中文: 通过与 Community Patrol 的合作，您可通过Crestway应用获得优先协助。如需指导或有人介入，只需一次通知，帮助即可抵达。

English: We check your housing before you move in. Fire safety, landlord verification, neighborhood walkthrough.
中文: 在您入住前，我们会检查住宿环境，包括消防安全、房东背景调查及社区实地考察。

English: 24/7 line answered by someone who knows your name and your situation.
中文: 24/7热线由熟悉您姓名及情况的人接听。

English: First-week city orientation so you know where the clinic is, how transit works, and what to do if something goes sideways.
中文: 第一周城市导览，帮助您了解诊所位置、交通方式及遇到问题时的应对措施。

English: Crestway Assist: a safety button in the app. One tap. Someone who knows you responds.
中文: Crestway Assist：应用内的安全按钮，一键响应，了解您情况的专人将提供帮助。

中文: 大学健康中心处理基础需求，但我们更进一步。Crestway Global 学生可享受专为国际学生设计的私人医疗及心理健康服务。

English: FAQ
中文: 常见问题

English: The questions parents actually ask.
中文: 家长最常问的问题。

English: What happens if my child has an emergency at 2am?
中文: 凌晨两点有紧急情况怎么办？

English: Students contact our emergency line, answered by an assigned advisor familiar with their situation. We coordinate hospital visits, housing access issues, travel complications, and other urgent matters. Families receive notification once the situation is addressed.
中文: 学生拨打我们的紧急电话，会有了解他/她的顾问接听。我们处理过就医、被锁在门外、航班误点等情况。问题解决后我们会第一时间联系你。

English: How is this different from the guardianship my kid's school requires?
中文: 这和学校要求的监护服务有什么不同？

English: Most school-required guardianship services are paperwork. We're involved week to week: sharing context, guiding decisions, and helping families navigate local systems.
中文: 多数学校的监护服务只做文件签字。我们每周参与：提供背景、协助决策、帮助家庭理解本地系统。

English: My kid wants independence. Won't this feel like babysitting?
中文: 孩子要独立，这会不会像"看管"？

English: Our students aren't being watched. They're being supported. When they need help, they don't have to figure it out alone.
中文: 我们不是监督，而是支持。当他/她需要帮助时，不必一个人摸索。

中文: 为什么家庭选择 Crestway Global

中文: 家庭选择 Crestway Global 的原因很简单：希望孩子每天都被照顾到，而不仅仅是在紧急时刻。

English: We provide trusted, on-the-ground support that safeguards students' safety, wellbeing, and growth, while giving parents clarity and peace of mind from anywhere in the world.
中文: 我们提供本地可信赖的支持，关注安全、身心与成长，同时让家长随时掌握情况。

English: Because confidence abroad comes from knowing someone you trust is always there.
中文: 远在海外，安心来自"有人一直在"。

English: About Us | Crestway Global
中文: 关于我们 | Crestway Global

English: About Us
中文: 关于我们

English: The trusted companion for students studying away from home.
中文: 专业监护，结合制度 expertise 与文化理解

English: A premium, dedicated support system for international families, combining institutional expertise with culturally informed care.
中文: 为国际家庭提供专业监护服务，融合制度 expertise 与文化敏感支持

English: Our Mission
中文: 我们的使命

English: Ensuring a safer, supported, and more confident journey abroad — for your child, and for you.
中文: 弥合大学支持与家庭期望之间的差距

English: Sending your child overseas is one of the biggest decisions a family can make. Crestway Global exists so you never have to wonder if your child is safe, supported, or thriving.
中文: Crestway Global 的建立旨在解决一个 documented 缺口：加拿大大学提供必要的学术和行政支持，但缺乏国际家庭期望的持续、个性化福利监测资源。

English: Crestway Global provides structured, on-the-ground support so your child is guided academically, emotionally, and practically while you remain informed, reassured, and confident from anywhere in the world. For families who believe that safety, wellbeing, and academic success go hand in hand, Crestway Global ensures students don't just attend university — they thrive.
中文: 我们的方法将专业 expertise 与文化理解相结合。我们维护安全、沟通和问责的结构化协议——同时认识到有效的监护需要人际关系和文化 fluency。

English: Leadership
中文: 领导层

English: Combined expertise in public safety and institutional development
中文: 公共安全与制度发展的综合 expertise

English: Crestway Global's founders bring complementary backgrounds: decades of law enforcement and community safety experience, alongside real estate development and student housing operations.
中文: Crestway Global 的创始人带来互补的背景：数十年的执法和社区安全经验，以及房地产开发和学生住房运营。

English: Dave at age 20, early in his police career

English: Dave Murray
中文: Dave Murray

English: Co-Founder & Director of Operations
中文: 联合创始人兼运营总监

English: Dave Murray served the City of Toronto for 31 years as a police officer, retiring at the rank of Staff Sergeant. His career included seven years as a criminal investigator, developing expertise in safety assessment, risk management, and community protection protocols.
中文: Dave Murray 在多伦多市警察局服务31年，以 Staff Sergeant 级别退休。他的职业生涯包括七年刑事调查员经历，培养了安全评估、风险管理和社区保护协议方面的 expertise。

English: This background directly informs Crestway Global's safeguarding procedures. Dave established our housing verification protocols, emergency response systems, and staff training programs. His institutional knowledge of Toronto's support systems—healthcare, law enforcement, social services—enables Crestway Global to navigate complex situations effectively.
中文: 这一背景直接 inform Crestway Global 的 safeguarding 程序。Dave 建立了我们的住房验证协议、紧急响应系统和员工培训项目。他对多伦多支持系统——医疗、执法、社会服务——的制度 knowledge 使 Crestway Global 能够有效 navigate 复杂情况。

English: Dave leads operations with an emphasis on documented procedures, accountability, and preventive care. His approach ensures that Crestway Global's support is both personally attentive and professionally structured.
中文: Dave 以强调文档化程序、问责和 preventive care 的方式领导运营。他的方法确保 Crestway Global 的支持既个人 attentive 又专业 structured。

English: Doug Hochglaube
中文: Doug Hochglaube

English: Doug Hochglaube
中文: Doug Hochglaube

English: Co-Founder & Strategic Director
中文: 联合创始人兼战略总监

English: Doug Hochglaube is a real estate developer with nearly two decades of experience in student housing and community-focused projects across Ontario. His work has involved the development and management of housing for thousands of students, giving him direct insight into the gaps between institutional support and student needs.
中文: Doug Hochglaube 是一位房地产开发商，在安大略省学生住房和社区 focus 项目方面有将近二十年经验。他的工作涉及开发和管理数千名学生的住房，使他对机构支持与学生需求之间的 gap 有直接 insight。

English: This operational background shapes Crestway Global's structural approach. Doug developed our partnership frameworks with universities, our housing assessment protocols, and our scalability planning. His experience with regulatory compliance, insurance, and risk management informs our governance standards.
中文: 这种运营背景塑造 Crestway Global 的结构化方法。Doug 开发了我们与大学的合作框架、住房评估协议和可扩展性规划。他在 regulatory compliance、保险和风险管理方面的经验 inform 我们的治理标准。

English: Doug directs Crestway Global's institutional relationships and strategic development, ensuring that our growth maintains service quality and professional standards. His focus is on building sustainable systems that can deliver consistent, accountable support at scale.
中文: Doug 指导 Crestway Global 的机构关系和战略发展，确保我们的增长保持服务质量和专业标准。他的 focus 是建立可持续系统，能够在规模上提供一致、可问责的支持。

Small challenges get addressed early, so students stay focused on their studies, personal growth, and success.

English: Three Pillars
中文: 三大支柱

English: What makes Crestway Global different isn't one thing. It's how everything connects.
中文: Crestway Global 的不同不在于某一件事，而在于一切如何连接。

English: Real people, real context
中文: 真实的人，真实的情境

English: We show up in person. We check housing before leases are signed. We know which walk-in clinic takes international insurance and which bus route gets you to campus fastest. This isn't remote support, it's local knowledge applied to your student's daily life.
中文: 我们亲自到场。签约前实地看房，知道哪家诊所接受国际保险，哪条公交线最快到校。这不是远程支持，而是本地知识应用于学生的日常生活。

English: Proactive, not reactive
中文: 主动，而非被动

English: Regular touchpoints catch issues early. We don't wait for a crisis. If a student seems withdrawn, if grades are slipping, if housing problems are brewing, we call the family first. Prevention is always better than damage control.
中文: 定期跟进，及时发现苗头。不等危机发生——如果学生情绪低落、成绩下滑、住房出问题，我们先联系家庭。预防永远好过善后。

English: Support without surveillance
中文: 支持，而非监视

English: Students keep their independence. We're not watching their every move. But when life gets complicated, confusing paperwork, a medical issue, a housing emergency, they have someone to call who already understands the situation.
中文: 学生保持独立。我们不监控每一步。但当生活变得复杂——繁琐的手续、健康问题、住房紧急情况——他们有人可以打电话，而那个人已经了解情况。

English: Partnerships

English: Building Global Partnerships to Empower International Students
中文: 建立全球合作，赋能国际学生

English: Crestway Global collaborates with institutions, recruitment agents, and businesses worldwide to create seamless support, opportunities, and growth for students.
中文: Crestway Global 与全球院校、招生代理和企业合作，为学生创造无缝支持、发展机会和成长空间。

English: For Institutions & Universities
中文: 面向院校与大学

English: Bridge the gap between admission and successful settlement.
中文: 弥合录取与成功安顿之间的差距。

English: Crestway Global does not recruit students and does not interfere with academic decision-making. We exist to make your international students more successful after they arrive.
中文: Crestway Global 不招生，也不干预学术决策。我们的存在是为了让您的国际学生在抵达后更加成功。

English: Fewer non-academic escalations
中文: 减少非学术事务升级

English: Housing crises, health emergencies, and homesickness rarely reach your international office. We handle them before they become your problem.
中文: 住房危机、健康紧急情况和思乡问题很少需要找到国际办公室。我们在问题变成您的麻烦之前就处理好了。

English: Protected students, reassured parents
中文: 学生受保护，家长更安心

English: Families feel confident their child has local support. That confidence translates to fewer worried calls to your admissions team.
中文: 家庭对孩子有本地支持感到放心。这种信心意味着更少的担忧电话打到您的招生团队。

English: Reduced administrative workload
中文: 减轻行政负担

English: Your admissions, international offices, and faculty can focus on academics while we handle settlement logistics and day-to-day student support.
中文: 您的招生、国际办公室和教职人员可以专注于学术事务，而我们处理安顿物流和日常学生支持。

中文: 面向招生代理

English: Your trusted partner in Canada for post-admission support.
中文: 您在加拿大的可信赖合作伙伴，提供录取后支持。

English: We complement, not replace, your core recruitment role. When families remember who helped their child succeed in Canada, your name comes up.
中文: 我们补充而非取代您的核心招生角色。当家庭回忆起谁帮助他们的孩子在加拿大取得成功时，您的名字会被提起。

English: Students who transition successfully
中文: 学生成功过渡

English: Your placements don't just arrive—they thrive. Students who feel supported stay enrolled and recommend you to others.
中文: 您安置的学生不仅仅是抵达——他们蓬勃发展。感到被支持的学生会继续学业并向他人推荐您。

English: Stronger parent trust
中文: 增强家长信任

English: When you recommend Crestway Global alongside placement, parents see you as someone who cares about outcomes, not just commissions.
中文: 当您在安置的同时推荐 Crestway Global，家长会认为您关心的是结果，而不仅仅是佣金。

English: Fewer post-arrival complaints
中文: 减少抵达后投诉

English: No more 3am calls about housing disasters or health scares. Emergencies get handled locally, and you stay informed without being overwhelmed.
中文: 不再有凌晨三点关于住房灾难或健康恐慌的电话。紧急情况在本地处理，您保持知情但不会被压垮。

中文: 更高的留存率和满意度

中文: 获得支持的学生完成学业。满意的家庭会推荐兄弟姐妹和亲戚。您的推荐网络不断扩大。

中文: 面向企业与机构

English: Access motivated, global student talent.
中文: 接触积极进取的全球学生人才。

English: Crestway Global partners with local and global businesses to offer internships, volunteer programs, and experiential learning opportunities for international students.
中文: Crestway Global 与本地和全球企业合作，为国际学生提供实习、志愿者项目和体验式学习机会。

English: Global talent pipeline
中文: 全球人才渠道

English: Connect with motivated international students who bring diverse perspectives, multilingual skills, and fresh energy to your team.
中文: 与积极进取的国际学生建立联系，他们带来多元视角、多语言技能和新鲜活力。

English: Positive brand engagement
中文: 积极的品牌互动

English: Associate your organization with international education and cross-cultural development. Students remember companies that gave them their first Canadian opportunity.
中文: 将您的组织与国际教育和跨文化发展联系起来。学生会记住给他们第一个加拿大机会的公司。

English: Trusted Canadian partnership
中文: 可信赖的加拿大合作伙伴

English: Work with an established support service that vets students and ensures they're prepared, reliable, and eager to contribute.
中文: 与一家成熟的支持服务机构合作，审核学生并确保他们准备充分、可靠且渴望贡献。

English: Why Crestway Global
中文: 为什么选择 Crestway Global

English: The partner your students deserve.
中文: 您的学生值得这样的合作伙伴。

English: Trusted expertise
中文: 值得信赖的专业能力

English: A highly experienced team bringing deep knowledge and hands-on experience across diverse roles within the international education sector.
中文: 经验丰富的团队，在国际教育领域各个角色拥有深厚知识和实战经验。

English: Student-centric approach
中文: 以学生为中心

English: We prioritize student safety, well-being, and success. When students thrive, everyone wins.
中文: 我们优先考虑学生的安全、身心健康和成功。学生蓬勃发展，所有人都受益。

English: Comprehensive support
中文: 全面支持

English: Guardianship, academic support, housing, wellness, crisis management, and more—all coordinated through a single trusted partner.
中文: 监护、学术支持、住房、健康、危机管理等——通过单一可信赖的合作伙伴协调一切。

English: Seamless collaboration
中文: 无缝协作

English: Transparent processes, clear structured reporting, and partnership-focused solutions. You always know how your referred students are doing.
中文: 透明的流程、清晰的结构化报告和以合作为导向的解决方案。您始终了解转介学生的情况。

English: Global perspective
中文: 全球视野

English: We connect institutions, agents, and students worldwide. Our team understands both Canadian systems and the cultures our students come from.
中文: 我们连接全球的院校、代理和学生。我们的团队理解加拿大系统，也理解学生来自的文化。

English: For Universities & Agents
中文: 为大学及招生代理机构

English: Want to see the full partnership model?
中文: 想了解完整的合作模式吗？

English: We've put together a detailed overview of how Crestway Global works alongside universities and recruitment agents. If you're exploring structured student support for your institution, this is a good starting point.
中文: 我们整理了 Crestway Global 与大学及招生代理机构合作的详细模式。如果您正在为机构寻找结构化的学生支持方案，这将是一个好的起点。

English: View Partnership Details
中文: 查看合作详情

English: Contact us directly
中文: 直接联系我们

English: Let's build something that works for your students.
中文: 让我们共同为学生打造有效的支持。

English: Whether you're a university, recruitment agent, or business organization, we'd like to show you what on-the-ground support looks like in practice.
中文: 无论您是大学、招生代理还是企业机构，我们期待向您展示结构化实地支持的实际效果。

English: Contact us
中文: 联系我们

English: Schedule a call
中文: 预约通话

English: Educational guardianship and support services for international students in Canada.
中文: 加拿大国际学生成功支持。

English: Student Ambassadors | Crestway Global
中文: 学生大使 | Crestway Global

English: Student Ambassadors
中文: 学生大使

English: Real students who've been where you're going.
中文: 他们走过你即将踏上的路。

English: Our ambassadors are current international students at Canadian universities. They represent Crestway Global on campus, host study groups, and help new students navigate everything from transit to homesickness.
中文: 我们的大使是在加拿大大学就读的在校国际学生。他们代表 Crestway Global 参与校园活动，组织学习小组，帮助新生处理从交通到思乡的一切问题。

English: The Program
中文: 项目介绍

English: What Student Ambassadors Do
中文: 学生大使做什么

English: Promotion & Awareness
中文: 宣传与推广

English: Represent Crestway Global at campus events and fairs. Share content on social media. Be the friendly face that shows new students they're not alone.
中文: 代表 Crestway Global 参加校园活动和展会。在社交媒体上分享内容。成为友好的面孔，让新生知道他们并不孤单。

English: Student Support
中文: 学生支持

English: Help students find safe routes around campus, navigate transit systems, and organize peer-led study sessions in libraries and cafeterias.
中文: 帮助学生找到安全的校园路线，掌握公共交通系统，在图书馆和咖啡厅组织同伴学习小组。

English: Community Building
中文: 社区建设

English: Gather feedback from peers about housing, campus resources, and student needs. Be the link between newcomers and the support they need.
中文: 收集同学对住房、校园资源和学生需求的反馈。成为新生与所需支持之间的桥梁。

English: Leadership
中文: 领导力

English: Act as role models, propose new engagement activities, and collaborate with Crestway Global coordinators to improve the student experience.
中文: 成为榜样，提出新的活动方案，与 Crestway Global 协调员合作改善学生体验。

English: Meet the Team
中文: 认识团队

English: Our Ambassadors
中文: 我们的大使

English: Students from York, TMU, Waterloo, and Western share their journeys and advice.
中文: 来自约克大学、多伦多都会大学、滑铁卢大学和西安大略大学的学生分享他们的经历和建议。

English: Anna, Student Ambassador at University of Waterloo
中文: Anna，滑铁卢大学学生大使

English: Anna
中文: Anna

English: University of Waterloo · Computer Science · 3rd Year
中文: 滑铁卢大学 · 计算机科学 · 大三

English: Originally from Japan
中文: 来自日本

English: Anna's Journey
中文: Anna 的故事

English: I was born and raised in Japan until the end of elementary school. After that, I moved to the United States, where I was part of the robotics team for five years. That sparked my interest in programming and Computer Science. I chose the University of Waterloo because of its co-op program.
中文: 我在日本出生长大，小学毕业后搬到美国，在那里参加了五年的机器人队，这激发了我对编程和计算机科学的兴趣。我选择滑铁卢大学是因为它的 Co-op 实习项目。

English: Why I Became an Ambassador
中文: 为什么成为大使

English: I took part in the initial planning of Crestway Global, and I thought it would be a great way to help students like me who are away from home for the first time feel connected to their new community.
中文: 我参与了 Crestway Global 的早期规划，我认为这是帮助像我一样第一次离家的学生融入新社区的好方法。

English: Biggest Challenge
中文: 最大的挑战

English: Food and diet. The dorm cafeteria was convenient, but it wasn't the same as home-cooked meals. It was also tough to stay healthy with irregular eating times.
中文: 饮食问题。宿舍食堂很方便，但和家里做的饭菜不一样。不规律的饮食时间也很难保持健康。

English: Advice for New Students
中文: 给新生的建议

English: "Be open to making friends. You're not the only one feeling alone, and connecting with others makes a big difference. Also, don't forget to take breaks from studying."
中文: "敞开心扉交朋友。你不是唯一感到孤独的人，与他人建立联系会带来很大的不同。还有，别忘了在学习之余休息一下。"

English: Favourite Canadian Experience
中文: 最喜欢的加拿大体验

English: Watching baseball games at the Rogers Centre. The stadium is huge, and the fans' energy makes it unforgettable!
中文: 在罗杰斯中心看棒球比赛。体育场很大，球迷的热情让人难忘！

English: Ridhima, Student Ambassador at York University
中文: Ridhima，约克大学学生大使

English: Ridhima
中文: Ridhima

English: York University · Commerce (Finance) · 3rd Year
中文: 约克大学 · 商科（金融）· 大三

English: Originally from India
中文: 来自印度

English: Ridhima's Journey
中文: Ridhima 的故事

English: I came to Canada to pursue my Bachelor of Commerce degree at York University. My journey has been filled with challenges, from adjusting to a new culture and climate to building a community, but it has also been incredibly rewarding. I've become involved in different student leadership and ambassador roles.
中文: 我来加拿大是为了在约克大学攻读商学学士学位。这段旅程充满挑战，从适应新的文化和气候到建立社交圈，但也非常有意义。我参与了多个学生领导和大使角色。

English: Why I Became an Ambassador
中文: 为什么成为大使

English: I know how overwhelming it can feel moving to a new country. I wanted to help make that transition smoother for others, and to share the lessons I learned along the way.
中文: 我知道搬到一个新国家会有多么不知所措。我想帮助让这个过渡更顺利，分享我一路走来学到的经验。

English: Biggest Challenge
中文: 最大的挑战

English: Adjusting to Canadian winters, figuring out housing and transit, and building a social circle in a completely new environment.
中文: 适应加拿大的冬天，弄清楚住房和交通，在一个全新的环境中建立社交圈。

English: Advice for New Students
中文: 给新生的建议

English: "Take small steps every day to step outside your comfort zone — whether it's joining a club, attending a campus event, or introducing yourself to someone new."
中文: "每天迈出一小步，走出舒适区——无论是加入一个社团、参加校园活动，还是向新认识的人介绍自己。"

English: Favourite Canadian Experience
中文: 最喜欢的加拿大体验

English: Visiting Montreal. The architecture is so amazing and the nightlife there is fantastic.
中文: 去蒙特利尔。那里的建筑太美了，夜生活也很棒。

English: Tien, Student Ambassador at York University
中文: Tien，约克大学学生大使

English: Tien
中文: Tien

English: York University · Statistics · 3rd Year
中文: 约克大学 · 统计学 · 大三

English: Originally from Vietnam
中文: 来自越南

English: Tien's Journey
中文: Tien 的故事

English: I came to Canada to pursue my studies in Statistics at York University. Currently, I hold several roles, including an internship as a Risk Analyst, as well as positions as a Research Assistant, Teaching Assistant, and Recruitment & Campus Ambassador. I also serve on the International Student Advisory Board.
中文: 我来加拿大是为了在约克大学学习统计学。目前，我担任多个职位，包括风险分析师实习、研究助理、教学助理和招生大使。我还在国际学生咨询委员会任职。

English: Why I Became an Ambassador
中文: 为什么成为大使

English: I want to help international students feel welcomed and supported. When I first came to Canada, I found it very difficult to adjust to a completely new culture. I hope to support new students so their transition can be smoother.
中文: 我想帮助国际学生感到被欢迎和支持。当我第一次来加拿大时，我发现很难适应一个全新的文化。我希望帮助新生让他们的过渡更顺利。

English: Biggest Challenge
中文: 最大的挑战

English: Understanding how finances work in Canada — setting up a bank account, getting a credit card, creating a SIN number, learning about taxes, and understanding what I needed to apply for a job.
中文: 了解加拿大的财务运作方式——开银行账户、办信用卡、申请 SIN 号码、了解税务，以及求职需要准备什么。

English: Advice for New Students
中文: 给新生的建议

English: "Don't be afraid to ask for help or opportunities. Support won't come to you automatically — you'll only receive it when you reach out to others."
中文: "不要害怕寻求帮助或机会。支持不会自动找上门——只有当你主动寻求时才能获得。"

English: Favourite Canadian Experience
中文: 最喜欢的加拿大体验

English: Queen's Park in downtown Toronto, where I enjoy hiking and then exploring different nearby restaurants.
中文: 多伦多市中心的女王公园，我喜欢在那里徒步，然后探索附近的餐厅。

English: F
中文: F

English: Fernand
中文: Fernand

English: Toronto Metropolitan University · Computer Science · 2nd Year
中文: 多伦多都会大学 · 计算机科学 · 大二

English: Originally from Venezuela
中文: 来自委内瑞拉

English: Fernand's Journey
中文: Fernand 的故事

English: I came to Canada in 2022 with my family as immigrants due to the situation in our home country. Moving here meant starting from scratch, adapting to a new environment, and learning a new language while building a life in a completely different society. My journey has taught me resilience, determination, and adaptability.
中文: 2022 年，由于我们国家的局势，我和家人作为移民来到加拿大。搬到这里意味着从零开始，适应新环境，学习新语言，同时在一个完全不同的社会中建立新生活。这段经历教会了我坚韧、决心和适应能力。

English: Why I Became an Ambassador
中文: 为什么成为大使

English: I want to share my experience as an international student and help others feel less alone during their transition. I want to make the process of adaptation easier for new students. Just like I wish it had been for me.
中文: 我想分享我作为国际学生的经历，帮助其他人在过渡期间不那么孤独。我想让新生的适应过程更容易，就像我希望当初对我来说更容易一样。

English: Biggest Challenge
中文: 最大的挑战

English: Adjusting to cold weather, finding housing, and learning how to manage things like banking, transit, and continuing my education.
中文: 适应寒冷的天气，找房子，学习如何处理银行、交通和继续学业等事务。

English: Advice for New Students
中文: 给新生的建议

English: "Be mindful of the actual time you will need to spend on each of your courses. Just because the curriculum says you should take 5 subjects doesn't mean you have to. You can start with 3 or 4 courses."
中文: "注意每门课程实际需要花费的时间。仅仅因为课程表说第一学期应该修 5 门课，并不意味着你必须这样做。你可以从 3-4 门课开始。"

English: Favourite Canadian Experience
中文: 最喜欢的加拿大体验

English: My favorite Canadian food is Poutine, and my favorite place is Niagara Falls!
中文: 我最喜欢的加拿大美食是 Poutine，最喜欢的地方是尼亚加拉大瀑布！

English: S
中文: S

English: Shafaq
中文: Shafaq

English: Western University (Ivey) · MSc Business Analytics
中文: 西安大略大学（Ivey）· 商业分析硕士

English: Graduate Student
中文: 研究生

English: Shafaq's Journey
中文: Shafaq 的故事

English: As an international student, I know firsthand how challenging it can be to navigate a new country while balancing academics and settling in. Sharing my own experiences, from managing housing and transit to adapting to academic life, can truly make a difference for newcomers.
中文: 作为一名国际学生，我深知在平衡学业的同时适应一个新国家是多么具有挑战性。分享我自己的经历，从管理住房和交通到适应学术生活，真的可以对新生产生影响。

English: Why I Became an Ambassador
中文: 为什么成为大使

English: I became a Crestway Global Student Ambassador to help make that journey smoother for others. I believe sharing my own experiences can truly make a difference for newcomers.
中文: 我成为 Crestway Global 学生大使是为了帮助让其他人的旅程更顺利。我相信分享我自己的经历真的可以对新生产生积极影响。

English: Biggest Challenge
中文: 最大的挑战

English: Adapting to the cold weather, figuring out Toronto's transit system, finding affordable housing, keeping up with the fast-paced academic environment, and experiencing culture shock while learning to settle into a completely new lifestyle.
中文: 适应寒冷的天气，弄清多伦多的交通系统，找到负担得起的住房，跟上快节奏的学术环境，以及在适应全新生活方式时经历的文化冲击。

English: Advice for New Students
中文: 给新生的建议

English: "Try to find people who help you grow, whether they're classmates, mentors, or friends. Don't hesitate to seek help if you're struggling — you're never alone in this journey."
中文: "试着找到能帮助你成长的人，无论是同学、导师还是朋友。如果你遇到困难，不要犹豫寻求帮助——在这段旅程中你永远不是孤独的。"

English: Favourite Canadian Experience
中文: 最喜欢的加拿大体验

English: Poutine is such a classic comfort dish! My family trip to Brockville stands out — taking the 1000 Islands cruise and hiking through Algonquin Park trails in fall were unforgettable moments.
中文: Poutine 是经典的舒适美食！我和家人去布罗克维尔的短途旅行令人难忘——乘坐千岛湖游轮，在秋天徒步穿越阿冈昆公园的小径都是难忘的时刻。

English: Want to become a Student Ambassador?
中文: 想成为学生大使吗？

English: We're looking for students at York, TMU, Queens, Western, UofT, and Waterloo who want to help fellow international students thrive.
中文: 我们正在寻找约克大学、多伦多都会大学、皇后大学、西安大略大学、多伦多大学和滑铁卢大学的学生，帮助其他国际学生茁壮成长。

English: Apply to Join
中文: 申请加入

English: Contact Us
中文: 联系我们

English: Educational guardianship and support services for international students in Canada.
中文: 加拿大国际学生专业监护服务。

English: The Problem | Crestway Global
中文: 问题所在 | Crestway Global

English: The Reality of International Education
中文: 国际教育的现实

English: The Reality of International Education
中文: 国际教育的现实

English: Every year, students arrive overseas with immense ambition but without a local structure.
中文: 每年，无数学生怀揣远大抱负抵达海外，却缺乏本地支持体系。

English: The Challenge
中文: 挑战

English: While universities provide world-class education at scale, their resources are designed for high-volume support.
中文: 大学提供世界一流的大规模教育，但其资源面向高容量支持设计。

English: Students are often required to navigate complex systems, join waiting lists, and seek out help only after a problem arises.
中文: 学生往往需要自行应对复杂体系、排队等候，且只有在问题出现后才能寻求帮助。

English: Closing the Gap
中文: 弥补缺口

English: Crestway Global exists to close the gap.
中文: Crestway Global 的使命是弥补这一缺口。

English: Families expect safety, accountability and a point of contact who knows their children personally.
中文: 家庭期望安全、问责，以及一位真正了解自己孩子的联系人。

English: We act as an accelerated support layer, identifying risks and intervening early. We don't wait for a student to struggle.
中文: 我们充当加速支持层，识别风险并尽早干预。我们不会等到学生陷入困境才行动。

English: We provide personalized 1:1 support for their academic journey, manage their daily logistics and safeguard their mental wellbeing.
中文: 我们为学生的学业旅程提供个性化的一对一支持，管理日常事务并守护其心理健康。

English: By maintaining a proactive, constant and professional dialogue between the student, the university, and the family, we ensure that their transition into adulthood is expertly managed.
中文: 通过在学生、大学和家庭之间保持主动、持续且专业的沟通，我们确保学生的成人过渡得到专业管理。

English: For international families, this is the essential infrastructure that turns potential risk into a secure path for success.
中文: 对于国际家庭而言，这是将潜在风险转化为安全成功之路的关键基础设施。

English: Educational guardianship and support services for international students in Canada.
中文: 加拿大国际学生专业监护服务

English: Governance & Safeguarding | Crestway Global
中文: 治理与保障 | Crestway Global

English: Governance & Safeguarding
中文: 治理与保障

English: Accountability built into every process.
中文: 每个流程都内嵌问责机制

English: Professional standards, documented procedures, and transparent oversight for families and partner institutions.
中文: 专业标准、规范程序、透明监督，服务家庭与合作机构

English: Safeguarding
中文: 学生保护

English: Student protection protocols
中文: 学生保护协议

English: Vetted Professionals
中文: 审查合格的专业人员

English: Background checks and vulnerable sector screening compliant with local regulations.
中文: 背景调查和弱势群体筛查，符合当地法规。

English: Multi-stage vetting including employment history and reference validation.
中文: 多阶段审查，包括工作经历和推荐信核实。

English: Ongoing performance evaluations and adherence audits
中文: 持续的绩效评估和合规审计

English: Operational Compliance
中文: 运营合规

English: All interactions are centralized within our secure, auditable documentation system.
中文: 所有互动集中记录在安全、可审计的文档系统中。

English: Strict adherence to ethical boundaries and internal Codes of Conduct.
中文: 严格遵守职业道德边界和内部行为准则。

English: Inquiries prioritized and addressed based on urgency and risk protocols.
中文: 根据紧急程度和风险协议优先处理和回应咨询。

English: Crisis Management Protocols
中文: 危机管理协议

English: Established pathways for immediate family and institutional notification.
中文: 建立了即时通知家庭和机构的明确路径。

English: Defined coordination with campus security, medical, and emergency services.
中文: 与校园安保、医疗和紧急服务的协调机制。

English: Operational alignment with university safeguarding protocols and local authority guidelines.
中文: 与大学保障协议和地方当局指导方针保持一致。

English: Privacy & Data
中文: 隐私与数据

English: Information handling and family rights
中文: 信息处理与家庭权利

English: Data Security and Protection
中文: 数据安全与保护

English: Limited access, information is restricted to authorized personnel only.
中文: 限制访问，信息仅限授权人员查阅。

English: Compliance with Canadian privacy legislation (PIPEDA)
中文: 遵守加拿大隐私法规（PIPEDA）

English: Encrypted storage for all student and family information
中文: 所有学生与家庭信息加密存储

English: Family Reporting and Communication
中文: 家庭报告与沟通

English: Scheduled updates provided regarding student welfare and milestones.

中文: 提供清晰的行政指导和状态提醒，但我们不提供法律或移民建议。对于复杂的签证许可事务，我们与持牌专业人士和法律顾问建立了转介渠道。

English: Housing Standards

English: Educational guardianship and support services for international students in Canada.
中文: 加拿大国际学生专业监护服务

English: For Parents | Crestway Global
中文: 为家长 | Crestway Global

English: For Parents
中文: 为家长

English: Your child is far away. Your peace of mind doesn't have to be.
中文: 孩子远在异国，安心可以近在咫尺

English: We understand what Chinese families need: safety first, regular communication, and the assurance that someone trustworthy is caring for your child.
中文: 我们理解中国家庭的需求：安全第一、定期沟通、有值得信赖的人照顾您的孩子

English: What Matters Most
中文: 最重要的事

English: We prioritize what Chinese parents care about
中文: 我们优先考虑中国家长关心的重点

English: Safety Above All
中文: 安全第一

English: Housing inspections, safe neighborhoods, emergency response. We check what you would check if you were there.
中文: 住房检查、安全社区、紧急响应。我们检查您如果在场也会检查的事项。

English: Regular Updates
中文: 定期更新

English: Monthly detailed reports on your child's wellbeing, not just academic performance but daily life and emotional state.
中文: 每月详细报告孩子的状况，不仅是学业表现，还有日常生活和情绪状态。

English: Mandarin Support
中文: 中文支持

English: Advisors who speak your language. No communication barriers when discussing your child's needs.
中文: 讲中文的顾问。讨论孩子需求时没有沟通障碍。

English: Emotional Care
中文: 情感关怀

English: We understand homesickness and the pressure of studying abroad. We catch problems before they become crises.
中文: 我们理解思乡之情和留学压力。我们在问题变成危机之前发现它们。

English: Our Commitment
中文: 我们的承诺

English: What you can count on
中文: 您可以依赖的保障

English: We visit housing before your child moves in
中文: 孩子入住前我们检查住房

English: We inspect every property for safety, verify landlords, check neighborhood conditions. No surprises when your child arrives.
中文: 我们检查每处房产的安全、核实房东、查看社区状况。孩子到达时不会有意外。

English: We answer the phone at 2 AM
中文: 凌晨2点我们也接电话

English: Emergencies don't wait for business hours. Your child has a direct line to someone who knows them and can help.
中文: 紧急情况不等人。您的孩子有一条直接线路，有人认识他们并能提供帮助。

English: We tell you what's really happening
中文: 我们如实告知情况

English: No filtering, no delays. If there's a problem, you know immediately. If things are going well, you know that too.
中文: 不隐瞒，不延迟。如果有问题，您立即知道。如果一切顺利，您也知道。

English: We help with the small things
中文: 我们帮助处理日常小事

English: Bank accounts, phone plans, where to buy familiar food. The daily details that make life abroad manageable.
中文: 银行账户、手机套餐、哪里买熟悉的食材。让海外生活可管理的日常细节。

English: We respect your family decisions
中文: 我们尊重您的家庭决定

English: We provide information and support. You remain the decision-maker for your child's life.
中文: 我们提供信息和支持。您仍是孩子生活的决策者。

English: Communication
中文: 沟通

English: How we keep you connected
中文: 我们如何保持联系

English: Weekly Check-ins
中文: 每周沟通

English: Your child meets with their advisor to discuss how the week went
中文: 您的孩子与顾问会面，讨论一周情况

English: Monthly Reports
中文: 每月报告

English: You receive a detailed written update on all aspects of your child's life
中文: 您收到孩子生活各方面的详细书面更新

English: Immediate Alerts
中文: 即时提醒

English: If something important happens, we contact you right away
中文: 如有重要事项发生，我们立即联系您

English: Common Concerns
中文: 常见顾虑

English: Questions Chinese parents ask us
中文: 中国家长常问我们的问题

English: Will my child be safe in Canada?
中文: 我的孩子在加拿大会安全吗？

English: Canada is among the safest countries for international students. We add an extra layer: verified housing, known contacts in emergencies, and advisors who check in regularly. We treat your child's safety as if they were our own.
中文: 加拿大是留学生最安全的国家之一。我们增加额外保障：核实住房、紧急情况已知联系人、定期沟通的顾问。我们把您孩子的安全当作自己的孩子来对待。

English: How do I know what's really happening if I'm so far away?
中文: 这么远我怎么知道真实情况？

English: Our monthly reports cover academics, health, social life, and emotional wellbeing. We include specifics: grades, doctor visits, activities, mood. If something is wrong, we tell you immediately. No surprises.
中文: 我们的月度报告涵盖学业、健康、社交生活和情绪状态。我们包含具体细节：成绩、就医、活动、心情。如果有问题，我们立即告知。没有意外。

English: My child is very independent. Will they feel watched?
中文: 我的孩子很独立，会觉得被监视吗？

English: Our support is available, not imposed. Independent students use us as a resource when needed. We respect their autonomy while remaining available for guidance.
中文: 我们的支持是可用的，不是强加的。独立的学生在需要时把我们当作资源。我们尊重他们的自主，同时保持提供指导的可及性。

English: What if my child gets sick?
中文: 如果孩子生病了怎么办？

English: We help them register with a family doctor, understand their insurance, and navigate the healthcare system. For serious issues, we accompany them to appointments and keep you informed every step of the way.
中文: 我们帮助他们注册家庭医生、理解保险、 navigate 医疗系统。对于严重问题，我们陪同就医，每一步都让您知情。

English: How do you handle the language barrier?
中文: 如何处理语言障碍？

English: Our team includes Mandarin-speaking advisors. We can explain complex situations—academic, medical, legal—in your language. We also help your child improve their English for daily independence.
中文: 我们的团队包括讲中文的顾问。我们可以用您的语言解释复杂情况——学业、医疗、法律。我们也帮助孩子提高英语日常独立能力。

English: What makes Crestway Global different from other services?
中文: Crestway Global 与其他服务有何不同？

English: We focus specifically on Chinese international students and their families. We understand the cultural expectations around family involvement and the specific challenges Chinese students face abroad. We're not a generic service—we're specialized.
中文: 我们专注于中国留学生及其家庭。我们理解中国家庭对家庭参与的期望，以及中国学生海外面临的具体挑战。我们不是通用服务——我们是专业的。

English: Start with a conversation
中文: 从一次对话开始

English: Tell us about your child and your concerns. We'll explain how we can help and whether we're the right fit for your family.
中文: 告诉我们关于您的孩子和您的顾虑。我们将解释如何帮助，以及我们是否适合您的家庭。

English: Schedule a consultation
中文: 预约咨询

English: Educational guardianship and support services for international students in Canada.
中文: 加拿大国际学生专业监护服务

English: University Partnerships | Crestway Global
中文: 大学合作 | Crestway Global

中文: 本页面仅限大学及代理合作伙伴访问。

English: Enter the access code provided by your Crestway Global contact.
中文: 请输入您的 Crestway Global 联系人提供的访问密码。

中文: 访问密码

English: Enter
中文: 进入

English: Incorrect code. Please try again or contact hello@crestwayglobal.com.
中文: 密码错误。请重试或联系 hello@crestwayglobal.com。

English: Back to Partnerships
中文: 返回合作伙伴页面

English: University Partnerships
中文: 大学合作

English: A student success platform that works alongside your institution.
中文: 与您的机构协同运作的学生成功平台。

English: Crestway Global partners with universities to strengthen international student retention, reduce non-academic escalations, and give families confidence that their child has on-the-ground support.
中文: Crestway Global 与大学合作，加强国际学生留存率，减少非学术升级事件，并让家庭确信孩子拥有在地支持。

English: The Challenge
中文: 挑战

English: International students face barriers that academics alone can't fix.
中文: 国际学生面临的障碍，光靠学术无法解决。

English: Adjusting to a new country and unfamiliar systems (banking, healthcare, transit, housing)
中文: 适应新国家和陌生系统（银行、医疗、交通、住房）

English: Limited family support due to geographic distance and time zones
中文: 因地理距离和时差导致的家庭支持有限

English: Academic pressure compounded by personal stress and isolation
中文: 个人压力和孤立感加重学业负担

English: No structured off-campus guidance for the day-to-day stuff that goes wrong
中文: 校外缺乏结构化的日常问题指导

English: Housing problems, health scares, and homesickness that escalate when no one catches them early
中文: 住房问题、健康突发和思乡情绪，如果无人及早发现，就会不断升级

English: These aren't edge cases. They're the norm. And when students struggle with these basics, retention drops and institutional risk goes up.
中文: 这些不是个别案例，而是普遍现象。当学生在这些基本问题上挣扎，留存率下降，机构风险上升。

English: The Crestway Global Model
中文: Crestway Global 模式

English: Four pillars of student success, delivered locally.
中文: 四大支柱，本地交付的学生成功方案。

English: Crestway Global acts as a trusted success partner. We give students structured guidance and practical support throughout their academic journey. We don't replace campus services. We fill the gaps around them.
中文: Crestway Global 作为值得信赖的成功合作伙伴，为学生提供结构化指导和实际支持。我们不取代校园服务，而是填补校园服务的空白。

English: 1. Student Success Management
中文: 1. 学业成功管理

English: Guidance that helps students stay on track academically and personally. Regular check-ins. Early detection of problems. Intervention before a rough week becomes a failed semester.
中文: 帮助学生在学业和个人方面保持正轨的指导。定期沟通，早期发现问题，在一周的困难变成一学期的失败前介入。

English: 2. Structured Student Support
中文: 2. 结构化学生支持

English: Help with housing, banking, healthcare, and local services. The things that take a new student 10x longer to figure out alone, we handle with them.
中文: 住房、银行、医疗和当地服务方面的帮助。新生独自摸索要花10倍时间的事，我们陪他们一起完成。

English: 3. Family Communication
中文: 3. 家庭沟通

English: International families get peace of mind. Monthly updates, direct advisor access, and immediate notification when something needs attention. Parents stay informed without hovering.
中文: 国际家庭获得安心。每月更新、顾问直接联系渠道、需要关注时的即时通知。家长随时掌握情况，但不过度干预。

English: 4. Personal Growth & Life Skills
中文: 4. 个人成长与生活技能

English: Independence, financial literacy, leadership. Students don't just finish their degree. They leave with the skills to do something with it.
中文: 独立性、财务素养、领导力。学生不只是拿到学位，他们带走的是能有所作为的能力。

English: Value for University Partners
中文: 大学合作伙伴的价值

English: Better outcomes. Lower risk. Stronger recruitment position.
中文: 更好的结果、更低的风险、更强的招生竞争力。

English: Improved Student Retention
中文: 提高学生留存率

English: Students who feel supported stay enrolled. It's that straightforward. Fewer mid-year withdrawals, fewer crisis transfers.
中文: 感到被支持的学生会继续就读。就这么简单。更少的中途退学，更少的危机转学。

English: Better International Student Experience
中文: 更好的国际学生体验

English: Satisfaction goes up when students aren't white-knuckling through their first year alone. Happy students tell other students.
中文: 当学生不再独自艰难度过第一年，满意度自然上升。满意的学生会推荐给其他学生。

English: Reduced Institutional Risk
中文: 降低机构风险

English: We catch problems early. Housing disputes, health concerns, academic struggles. By the time it would have reached your office, we've already been working on it.
中文: 我们及早发现问题：住房纠纷、健康隐忧、学业困难。在问题传到您办公室之前，我们已经在处理了。

English: Competitive Recruitment Advantage
中文: 招生竞争优势

English: Universities that offer structured success support stand out to international families making six-figure decisions about where to send their children.
中文: 提供结构化成功支持的大学，在国际家庭做出六位数决定时脱颖而出。

English: Stronger Global Reputation
中文: 更强的全球声誉

English: Positive student outcomes build trust with international families. Trust brings referrals. Referrals build your international program.
中文: 积极的学生成果赢得国际家庭的信任。信任带来推荐。推荐壮大您的国际项目。

English: Partnership Model
中文: 合作模式

English: We work alongside you. Not in place of you.
中文: 我们与您并肩工作，而非取代您。

English: Crestway Global supplements existing campus services. We don't replace your international student office, counselling centre, or housing services. We handle the off-campus, day-to-day support that falls outside your scope.
中文: Crestway Global 补充现有校园服务。我们不取代您的国际学生办公室、心理咨询中心或住房服务。我们处理校外的日常支持。

English: International student success programs
中文: 国际学生成功项目

English: Structured support from arrival through graduation.
中文: 从入学到毕业的结构化支持。

English: Parent engagement initiatives
中文: 家长参与计划

English: Regular communication that builds family confidence in your institution.
中文: 建立家庭对您机构信心的定期沟通。

English: Student transition and integration support
中文: 学生过渡与融入支持

English: First-week orientation, housing verification, city navigation.
中文: 首周导览、住房验证、城市指引。

English: Success mentorship and life-skills programming
中文: 成功辅导与生活技能项目

English: Financial literacy, independence building, and peer community.
中文: 财务素养、独立能力培养和同伴社区。

English: Ready to talk about what this looks like for your institution?
中文: 准备好讨论这对您的机构意味着什么了吗？

English: We'd like to walk you through our model and discuss how Crestway Global can support your international students.
中文: 我们希望向您介绍我们的模式，讨论 Crestway Global 如何支持您的国际学生。

English: Contact our partnerships team
中文: 联系我们的合作团队

English: Back to Partnerships
中文: 返回合作伙伴页面

English: Educational guardianship and support services for international students in Canada.
中文: 加拿大国际学生成功支持。
